name: Chicken, Cheese and Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 8 Ounces Chicken Breast, Baked and Diced
1 Cup Green Beans, Canned French Style
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, sauté onions until tender (use a dollop of margarine and water).
2. In a 3-quart saucepan, heat margarine over medium heat until bubbly.
3. Add flour, mustard, and stir quickly to combine thoroughly.
4. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly and cooking until smooth.
5. Add broth mix, pepper, and salt; mix well.
6. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until the mixture is thick (about 5-10 minutes).
7. Stir in cheese until melted.
8. Add chicken and vegetables, continuing to cook until heated through.
9. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Spray a casserole dish with non-stick cooking spray and pour the chicken mixture into the dish.
11. Separate each biscuit into two layers of dough; arrange on top of the chicken mixture.
12. Bake until biscuits are golden, about 7-10 minutes.
